headline: 4 Stocks to Boost Your Portfolio as Manufacturing Activity Rebounds
summary: ASTE, NDSN, RBC, ZBRA stand to gain as U.S. manufacturing PMI hits a 3-year high, signaling a rebound fueled by rising demand and expansion.

headline: Nordson Corp (NASDAQ:NDSN) Passes the "Caviar Cruise" Quality Investing Screen
summary: Nordson Corp exemplifies quality investing with durable competitive strengths, high ROIC, strong cash conversion, and a solid balance sheet.
